docs.title: Ariel Arigossi
docs.text:
Linux System Administrator & IT Forensic Consultant

Corrientes, Argentina

Dedicated and detail-oriented System Administrator with strong expertise in Linux backend systems and comprehensive networking knowledge. Over 10 years of experience ensuring optimal performance, security, and availability of critical IT infrastructure.

Currently serving as System Administrator at Ministerio Publico Fiscal (Corrientes, Argentina), where I deploy and maintain IT infrastructure, keeping systems up and running 24/7. Previously worked as an IT Forensic Consultant for law enforcement, performing digital evidence analysis, incident response, and expert testimony.

docs.title: What I Do
docs.text:
• Design and maintain Linux-based server infrastructure
  • Deploy and manage containerized workloads with Docker
  • Implement network architectures with MikroTik and OPNSense
  • Build security monitoring and log analysis tools
  • Develop Python and Bash automation scripts

docs.title: Get in Touch
docs.text: Feel free to reach out if you'd like to collaborate on a project, have questions about my work, or just want to connect. The best way to reach me is through GitHub or LinkedIn.

docs.title: Experience
docs.text:
System Administrator

Ministerio Publico Fiscal - Corrientes, Argentina

2014 – Present

  • Managed and maintained Linux-based server infrastructure, ensuring 99.9% uptime and security.
  • Designed and implemented network architecture, optimizing data flow and minimizing latency.
  • Conducted regular system updates, patches, and security audits to mitigate vulnerabilities.
  • Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deploy and maintain virtualized environments.
  • Led migration of virtual machine-based services to container-based solutions (Docker).
  • Implemented MikroTik and OPNSense-based network infrastructure.
  • Deploy and maintain IT infrastructure keeping systems up and running 24/7.
  • Deploy workflow solutions and strategies to handle requests and demands in a timely manner.
IT Forensic & Law Enforcement Consultant

Ministerio Publico Fiscal - Corrientes, Argentina

2014 – Present

  • Performed digital forensics analysis on seized devices including computers, phones, and tablets.
  • Created detailed incident reports and forensic documentation for legal proceedings.
  • Maintained strict chain of custody principles for all digital evidence.
  • Provided expert testimony in court, explaining forensic procedures and findings.
  • Conducted information gathering and incident response for law enforcement cases.
  • Analyzed diverse data sources to support investigations and produce digital evidence.

docs.title: Projects
docs.text:
linux-wtmpreport Python

Linux log analysis tool that parses wtmp and secure logs into SQLite, generating detailed HTML/PDF reports with matplotlib visualizations. Handles rotated and compressed log files.

Python SQLite Matplotlib WeasyPrint pcap-reportgenerator Python

GUI application for analyzing PCAP/PCAPNG network packet captures and generating styled HTML reports with interactive tables, protocol distribution charts, top talkers, and traffic summaries.

Python PyQt5 Scapy Bootstrap 5 httpd-fancyreport Python

Apache HTTP server log parser that generates comprehensive HTML and PDF reports. Analyzes access and error logs, produces charts for request frequency, status codes, top URLs, and error levels.

Python Matplotlib WeasyPrint Apache docker-compose Docker

Collection of 21 ready-to-use Docker Compose configurations for self-hosted services including Appsmith, Home Assistant, Metabase, Pi-hole, Ollama WebUI, Uptime Kuma, and more.

Docker YAML Self-Hosted tuxtuner Shell

Interactive Bash script for Linux server performance tuning. Optimizes memory, network, file descriptors, I/O scheduling, and CPU governor with real-time verification of applied settings.

Bash Linux Performance Sysctl
